title: Formatted Text in Context
purpose: Diagnostic for italic/bold/monospace preservation across three document positions: body paragraph, table cell, footnote body. 9 (format × position) cells let us determine whether converter behavior is uniform or position-dependent.

structure.glossary_anchor: Section 4 lists all 9 tokens in plain text — content-presence anchor that does not leak format information

ground_truth_basis: source.tex (deterministic) + visual spot-check of source.pdf (verified 2026-04-22). Body text deliberately written as cloud/Greek-letter prose with no self-referential formatting hints; the Glossary section lists tokens plain to anchor content-presence without leaking format.

files.probes.json: 20 probes: 9 paired content+format probes (one per cell), 1 cross-cell hallucination, 1 false-format hallucination (epsilon)
